# Zscaler Cellular | Zscaler

**Source:** https://www.zscaler.com/products-and-solutions/zscaler-cellular
**Captured:** 2026-04-25 via WebFetch.

---

## Title & Value Proposition

**Simplify IoT & Mobile Security with Zscaler Cellular**

"Enable global connectivity, secure traffic steering, and zero trust controls for your cellular-connected devices and telecom infrastructure."

## Key Capabilities

- **Zero Trust Policy Enforcement**: Dynamic policy-driven traffic steering with individual device segmentation
- **Centralized Visibility**: 100% traffic visibility, SIM activity telemetry, anomaly detection from a unified dashboard
- **Agentless Architecture**: No software agents required on IoT/mobile endpoints regardless of device type
- **Lateral Movement Prevention**: Network segmentation eliminating attack-surface expansion
- **Global Coverage**: Multi-operator support with optimized egress routing (search results elsewhere cite 520+ global carriers)

## Deployment Model

Two deployment options:

1. **Zscaler Cellular Service** — "Plug-and-play agentless security for cellular IoT devices" (vending machines, EV chargers, kiosks)
2. **Zscaler Cellular Partner Service** — Partner-managed solution for SIM infrastructure integration with high availability/failover

**SIM-based + agentless**: devices forward traffic to the Zscaler platform via Zscaler-issued SIMs; no infrastructure changes needed.

## Use Cases

- Manufacturing/warehouse: asset tracking, energy sensors, circuit backup
- Infrastructure: out-of-band communications, real-time sensor insights
- Retail: POS systems, kiosks, inventory handheld scanners
- Logistics/Transportation/Automotive: vehicle telemetry, track-and-trace, connected cabins
- Government: foreign deployments, secure communications

## Launch / Adoption

GA August 2025 (per company press releases). Adoption namedrops include Sandvik and Maverick Transportation.
